notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Zack Short to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Julio Rodríguez steals (6) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez steals (7) 3rd base. Randy Arozarena steals (18) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone lines out to center fielder Zach McKinstry.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone grounds out, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Josh Naylor to 3rd.
